```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("R/functions.R")
```

```{=latex}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\begin{center}

\vspace*{2cm}

REGULATION OF MAPT (TAU) TRANSLATION IN BASAL FOREBRAIN AXONS

\vspace{1cm}

by

\vspace{0.5cm}

ELINA NEMTSOV

\vspace{1.5cm}

A Dissertation submitted to the

Graduate School-Newark

Rutgers, The State University of New Jersey

in partial fulfillment of the requirements

for the degree of

Master of Science

Graduate Program in Biology

\vspace{1cm}

written under the direction of

Dr. Wilma Friedman

\vspace{0.5cm}

and approved by

\vspace{1.5cm}

\rule{7cm}{0.4pt}

\vspace{1cm}

\rule{7cm}{0.4pt}

\vspace{1cm}

\rule{7cm}{0.4pt}

\vspace{1cm}

\rule{7cm}{0.4pt}

\vspace{1.5cm}

Newark, New Jersey

\vspace{0.5cm}

May 2026

\end{center}
\newpage
```
